summary: Added legacy mark-scheme foreign-boundary detection so missed same-page neighboring question rows do not leak into the active answer block or crop.
test_results: Focused loop verification passed in the final session: 111 focused tests passed and 12 rendering-marker tests passed.
acceptance_criteria_status: Satisfied: legacy blocks stop before later missed top-level question rows.
Satisfied: mark-scheme rendered region bottoms are clamped to the computed foreign boundary.
Satisfied: question-detection tests pass in the focused suite.
repo_hygiene_notes: No generated outputs or canonical inputs were changed.
known_risks: This iteration did not yet address false anchors from preliminary mark-scheme notes pages.
implementation_summary: Added _legacy_foreign_mark_scheme_boundary_y to find later same-page legacy question rows.
Added _is_later_mark_scheme_question to compare candidate question numbers against the active anchor.
Applied the same boundary to _mark_scheme_regions_for_start and tagged regions with markscheme_foreign_question_boundary_trimmed.
Added a focused regression test for a missed same-page neighboring mark-scheme question.
behavior_change: Legacy mark-scheme text blocks and rendered regions now clamp at a later foreign question boundary instead of including the next question's answer rows.
scope_control: The implementation is limited to legacy mark-scheme parsing and crop bounds.
